class.name: JustAMCPPrompt
class.brief_description: Base class for prompts exposed through the MCP prompt API.
class.description: [JustAMCPPrompt] defines the prompt interface used by [JustAMCPPromptExecutor]. Subclasses provide a prompt schema, render prompt messages from arguments, and optionally provide completions for prompt argument values. [codeblock] var prompt = JustAMCPPromptBlaziumContext.new() print(prompt.get_name()) print(prompt.get_prompt()) [/codeblock]

method.name: complete
method.description: Returns completion suggestions for one prompt argument. The [param argument] dictionary follows the MCP completion request shape and usually contains the argument name and current value.

method.name: get_messages
method.description: Renders this prompt with [param args] and returns an MCP-compatible prompt result dictionary containing message content or an error.

method.name: get_name
method.description: Returns the stable prompt name used by [method JustAMCPPromptExecutor.get_prompt] and MCP prompt references.

method.name: get_prompt
method.description: Returns this prompt's MCP schema dictionary, including its name, description, and accepted arguments.
